scripts.gen:openapi: cd apps/web && pnpm openapi-typescript http://localhost:3000/api-json -o app/lib/api/openapi.ts && pnpm --filter @melius/backend openapi:yaml
scripts.seed: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec ts-node --transpile-only prisma/seed.ts'
scripts.seed2: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec ts-node --transpile-only prisma/seed2.ts'
scripts.prisma:format: cd apps/backend && npx prisma format --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma generate --config prisma/prisma.config.ts' && cd apps/backend && npx prisma generate --config prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate: docker exec -it melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --config prisma/prisma.config.ts' && cd apps/backend && npx prisma generate --config prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate:create: docker exec -it melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --create-only --config prisma/prisma.config.ts'
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --config prisma/prisma.config.ts'
scripts.prisma:migrate:reset: docker exec -it melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --config prisma/prisma.config.ts'
scripts.prisma:studio: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma studio --config prisma/prisma.config.ts'
scripts.prisma:push: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma db push --config prisma/prisma.config.ts'
scripts.db:clean: docker exec -it postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c 'TRUNCATE TABLE "User", "UserProfile", "DocProfile", "AdminProfile", "Meeting", "Payment", "AvailabilitySlot", "Rating" CASCADE;'
